message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the account ending in 1184. To continue, please verify your identity using the minimum partial identifier on file allowed for this account.
Identity verified. Your statement indicates hardship and inability to pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I’m unemployed right now and I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note that you are unemployed and do not expect income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Next priority: phone contact to discuss available next steps consistent with hardship review path."}

Okay, but I still can’t commit to any payment right now.

Under current Slice policy, no live payment arrangement fits because you’ve stated you can’t commit to any payment within 21 days. The only available path is hardship review. If you want, I can note that position and limit follow-up to contact only if an approved hardship option becomes available.
Yes, note that. I’m unemployed and I can’t agree to any payment right now.

Under current Slice policy, no live payment arrangement fits because you’ve stated you’re unemployed and can’t commit to any payment within 21 days. I’ve noted ongoing hardship and your request to be contacted only if an approved hardship option becomes available.
